# Task: Add read-only carto stats CLI command

> Task ID: CART-S02-T02
> Sprint: [CART-S02](../INDEX.md)
> Status: 📝 draft
> Estimate: S

## Description

Register a read-only stats command in src/cli.ts using the existing commander .command().description().action() pattern (modeled on list). Action loads the graph via load(), derives counts via graphStats(graph), and console.logs a single line <n> nodes, <m> edge(s) with independent singular/plural for both counts (e.g. 2 nodes, 1 edge). chalk for success output; no save(); no new flags. Pluralisation lives in cli.ts.
